sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import './Rules.css'; const Rule=()=>{ return(

RULES AND REGULATIONS

> CAUTION DEPOSIT WILL BE RETURNED ONLY BY THE END OF THE ACADEMIC YEAR. > ANY CORRECTION IN THE MESS BILL SHOULD BE INFORMED WITHIN 5 DAYS AFTER PUBLISHING THE MESS BILL. > MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT THE MESS SECRETARY FOR BILL PAYMEMNT IF THEY ARE OUT OF STATION. > FINE IMPOSED WILL BE FINAL. > SHARING MEALS ARE NOT PERMITTED. > INMATES ARE NOT ALLOWED TO TAKE MESS UTENSILS OUT OF MESS. > HAVING FOOD AFTER MESS TIME IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED FOR ALL INMATES. STRICT ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN. > MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO UPDATE THE MESS REGISTER WITH JOINING DATE, EXTRAS, SELF GUESTS, GUESTS AND REDUCTIONS. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL BE FINED. > MESS INMATES ARE REQUESTED TO HAVE FOOD INSIDE THE MESS. NOBODY IS PERMITTED TO TAKE FOOD OUT OF THE MESS. > ANY ADJUSTMENT IN MESS TIMING FOR ANY DEPARTMENT STUDENTS MUST BE ADDRESSED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE. > ALL MESS INMATES MUST SHOW MESS ID CARD BEFORE HAVING FOOD. > EXTRAS PROVIDED WILL BE LIMITED, SO IT WILL BE BASED ON FIRST COME FIRST SERVE. > FEASTS WILL BE PROVIDED ONCE IN A MONTH AND THE DATE WILL BE INTIMATED BY THE MESS SECRETARY. > LATE MESS SHOULD BE INFORMED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE. > MESS CUT WILL ONLY BE APPLICABLE FOR A MINIMUM OF 3 CONSECUTIVE DAYS. > MESS CUT SHALL BE ENTERED IN THE MESS REGISTER AND SHOULD BE INFORMED TO THE MESS COMMITTEE IN ADVANCE. > DECISION OF THE MESS SECRETARY WILL BE FINAL.
); }; export default Rule;
